the public.


am not in favor of a closed
town, but | am in favor of controll
ing the saloons and dives and pre-
venting them being made the place
for enticement and ruin of young
men and girls and the loungins
place and resort for buns and
prostitutes. am in favor OF re-
moving all boxes, curtains, couches
and chairs from saloons. am also
in favor Of granting but one
license to any man, and OF making
the license holder responsible for
the conduct Of the saloon.


| am in favor of the city demand
ing and receiving interest ON its
money, as provided by law.


am in favor of reduced water
rates.


am in favor of municipal owner
ship of electric light. power and
gas monopolies as soon as prac-
ticable


am in favor of giving every In
dividual, business and corporation
a fair show and equal rights. but
| am unutterably opposed to any
favoritism of special interests, on
of any disregard for the rights OF
the common man and the public.


am in favor of the city council
confirming for nomination to city
office only efficient and competent
men, regardless of politics, special
interests or pull of any sort,


G. TWITCAELIA
